rationale.R1.2: The section's concluding claim ('faithful signal … across all instruction types … full spectrum of modern LLMs') rests on four similarly-sized open-weight models and one corpus; logical consistency between premises and that sweeping conclusion is plausibly a central task if the user wants a scientific review.
rationale.R1.3: Empirical scope (n=4 models, all 7–9B open-weight; κ=0.62 moderate agreement; r=0.71 correlation) does not obviously support universality claims in the final paragraph — evidence-claim alignment is plausibly load-bearing if the help requested is scientific rather than stylistic.
